text:
Once upon a time, a squirrel named Oliver cherished a single nut that had been carefully hidden beneath a fallen leaf. Every day, he returned to its secret spot, admiring its gleaming shine.

As autumn came, leaves began to fall around Oliver's hideout. One particular leaf fluttered down, drifting close to his precious nut. With trembling tail, Oliver reached out and gently grabbed it.

But then he remembered something. Last night, he saw a raccoon sneak into their pile. Maybe it didn’t like the nut? Oliver imagined it gnawing on something else, something tasty. He frowned. No, no! That could never happen to him.

He set out a brave plan. Oliver would visit every tree near his pile, shaking leaves all day to look just like a fallen leaf. Night after night, he repeated this dance. Each time he reached down, hoping for another nut.

Finally, one evening, his luck prevailed. A soft rustle among the leaves, and
